goal: Harden the external CUDA real-adapter training handoff preflight package so the remaining real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker is easier to resolve without weakening release gates.
head: 448562b
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add fail-fast input and package readiness checks to the generated external CUDA training handoff, focused tests, refreshed PREPARED_NOT_RUN handoff artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick
required_evidence: Generated CUDA training handoff JSON includes package_readiness_checks for host-execution prerequisites.
Generated shell fails fast when dataset, Python executable, LLaMA-Factory CLI, model cache, backend config, or RC handoff shell is missing.
Focused tests verify the new package readiness checks and shell guards.
Generated handoff status remains PREPARED_NOT_RUN and does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate hardens external CUDA execution handoff only; it does not accept evidence or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add explicit package_readiness_checks and shell fail-fast guards to scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py outputs.
phase_notes.audit: The existing handoff prepares training commands, but generated shell does not check dataset/Python/RC handoff availability before starting the CUDA sequence.
phase_notes.build: Patch handoff generator, focused tests, generated PREPARED_NOT_RUN handoff artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, regenerate handoff artifacts, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this handoff hardening phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: External CUDA real-adapter training handoff preflight/package readiness guards, focused tests, refreshed PREPARED_NOT_RUN handoff artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
